claim_boundary: These evidence rules apply only to the SkillGuard Global Router skill. They do not prove runtime checker execution, fixture coverage, CLI checks, tests, suite automation, package publication, code-contract validation, release readiness, installed prompt freshness, external services, or future AI behavior without separate current evidence.

evidence.summary: Runtime contract for router maintenance work.

required_evidence: Current prompt projection or install report
Current check-global-prompt output before prompt freshness claims
Current resolve-global-skill output before handoff claims
residual_risk: Freshness still depends on rerunning the router commands after skill roots or prompt files change.
